required_preferences.fact: Temporarily avoids bouldering altogether due to wrist fracture — no gym climbing until cleared by doctor

supersedes.fact: Started bouldering solo or joins open climbing groups at the gym — former climbing partner is less available since moving away

required_preferences.fact: No longer reserves Thursday mornings exclusively for UX practice — regularly attends core product team meetings during this time as required by the startup

supersedes.fact: Blocks Thursday mornings for online UX practice — never books client meetings during this slot

required_preferences.fact: Checks email only twice daily at set times — never responds outside these windows
Reserves a dedicated workspace in the apartment to maintain focus and minimize distractions during overlapping remote work hours with her partner
Blocks calendar for team standup and daily check-in meetings every morning — never schedules personal tasks during this time slot
Visits parents in Boulder for Sunday family dinners but leaves before 8pm to prep for the workweek — never stays overnight

persona: A 24-year-old mobile app developer freelancing full-time
